__comment: GPJ composite indexes (v101a #3). The app's job-pool queries need these two; without the active+ingestedAt one, every pool build logs 'wide unscoped query failed' and silently degrades to an UNORDERED limit() pull — same read count (no cost inflation) but a random-by-docID sample instead of the newest window, so fresh jobs get missed and stale ones leak in. Create via the console error link (~30s) or `firebase deploy --only firestore:indexes`.
